item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That is better, thanks for the suggestion.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
pretty good but kinda clunky as well.

Description: SCP-4825 is a wooden chair with leather cushions. When a human and items being worn or held by them sits on SCP-4825 they will spontaneously turn into traces of dust. Touching SCP-4825 with other body parts such as hands, feet, etc. does not activate its anomalous property.

Should be

Description: SCP-4825 is a wooden chair with leather cushions. When a human being sits on SCP-4825 they will spontaneously turn into dust, along with any objects held or worn by the subject. Simply touching SCP-4825 with other body parts such as the hands or feet do not activate its anomalous property.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Well this was somewhat good, the anomaly itself is boring but that's a given considering the focus here were the diary entries. Inclusion of these letters opens up potential to make a returning background entity if you decide to follow up. Worth an upvote.
The only thing that bothers me is the shift in character behaviour seems somewhat abrupt but there's a hint of him not exactly changing, just hiding from himself that he still is short fused.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I decided to take a look through this after I saw it was posted, and it was a bit different. So I read through it and compiled a list of crit.
+ Crit.
-

an anomalous furniture container

This is a mouthful and doesn’t flow well, may I suggest something more akin to, “an anomalous objects vault.” As well as that it isn’t too clinical imo.

inside an anomalous furniture container in

You use words that contain the word “in” in a quick succession, this disrupts your flow. May I suggest replacing the second in with ‘at’.

Individuals that were terminated

You can cut the phrase “that were”.

explode

The word “combust” would fit the tone better.

leaving small traces

Get rid of small, as the word traces already tells the audience that it is a small amount of stuff. On top of this “small” is a non clinical term as it undefined term, like small could be 1 cubic meter or lower.

Touching SCP-4825 with other body parts such as hands, feet, etc does not activate the anomalous ability of SCP-4825.

I would suggest cutting “of SCP-4825” and replacing it with ‘its anomalous ability’. This disrupts the flow and it’s strange when read out loud.

to investigate reports of unusually high disappearances.

Either “unusually high rate of unexplained disappearances” or “an unusually high number of disappearances”

believed to pertain to SCP-4825.

This line can be inferred as it is pretty obvious that this pertains to this SCP.

Momma always told me greed is the downfall of men.

Like I get you going for the biker vibe but my suggestion would be to get rid of this and replace it with another thing that’s a bit more, “fuck the world vibes.”

have gotten fire,

Fired

promotions, raises you weak son of a bitch man

Either put a comma after raises or put an and in there.

(legal one)

I feel like the one should be removed and legal should be kept

effected

How is this turn into unaffected?

lady syndrome I guess

“Syndrome, I guess”

Overall: There are points in the journals that he has a major character switch in the span of a second. There needs to be more buildup between these major transitions. It is a no vote for now.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Man I really thought this was gunna suck but you got me. You did a boring anomaly super well.

When I first read the description, I was like “eh. That’s boring as hell.” But I continued reading it, and man was it not what I expected! I love the story you put with this person and chair, especially from such a simple concept. Great job! +1 from me!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Nice execution of auch a simple anomaly. Good job!

item.title: A thing that makes you explode.
item.content:encoded:
A quote that inspires people.

Thanks to all the people who looked over the draft, who all suggested things that I tried to implement.
TheMightyMcB
Gamesofmax
Alces_alces
Brewsterion 1017
Nerdibbles
Westrin

image source = https://ccsearch.creativecommons.org/photos/8276de22-d7cd-4066-a3b3-b9d5c6282fbf
